_meta.description: Status, buff, debuff, and utility moves for Hex Battle Simulator. All moves have base_power 0. Effects are applied by the TurnEngine at resolution. Status moves count toward the terrain compulsion rule only if they are terrain moves — pure status moves do not satisfy the terrain requirement.

Calm Mind.description: The user focuses and calms its mind. Raises both Sp. Atk and Sp. Def by 1 stage. Gardevoir's core setup move — a few turns of Calm Mind turns her 125 Sp. Atk into an overwhelming force while her 115 Sp. Def becomes nearly unbreakable.

Swords Dance.description: The user performs an intense, rhythmic dance that sharply raises Attack by 2 stages. Used by Charizard (Fire Fang / Dragon Claw), Lucario (Close Combat / Extreme Speed), and Absol (Sucker Punch / Night Slash). Transforms already-powerful physical attackers into one-hit threats.

Nasty Plot.description: The user stimulates its brain by thinking devious thoughts, sharply raising Sp. Atk by 2 stages. Used by Pikachu (Thunderbolt / Discharge) and Absol (Dark Pulse / Shadow Ball). Pikachu's 50 Sp. Atk at +2 reaches the equivalent of 100 — threatening KOs that would otherwise be impossible.

Hypnosis.description: A hypnotic gaze that puts the target to sleep. Single target, range 3. Requires line of sight. 60% accuracy — high risk, massive reward. If it lands, the target's movement phase is skipped entirely next turn, leaving them unable to reposition or close distance. Gardevoir's only offensive status move — creates the breathing room needed for Calm Mind.

Pain Split.description: The user adds its HP to the target's HP, then equally splits the combined total. Single target, range 2. Always hits. Requires line of sight. Gengar's survival tool — with only 110 HP, Pain Split against a healthier opponent simultaneously heals Gengar and drains the target. Most effective when Gengar is low HP and the opponent is high HP.

Destiny Bond.description: The user binds its life force to the opponent's. Always hits. No target needed — self-activation. If the user faints during the same turn this move is declared, the opponent also faints immediately (regardless of their remaining HP). Shared by Gengar and Absol — the ultimate deterrent against aggressive plays. Declaring Destiny Bond forces the opponent to either back off or risk mutual destruction.

Taunt.description: The user taunts the target into a rage. Single target, range 3. Always hits. Requires line of sight. The taunted Pokémon can only use physical or special attack moves for 2 turns — terrain, status, and buff moves are blocked. Used by Charizard and Lucario to shut down setup-heavy opponents like Gardevoir (Calm Mind) or Pikachu (Nasty Plot).

Thunder Wave.description: A jolt of electricity that paralyzes the target. Single target, range 3. Always hits. Requires line of sight. Halves the target's effective Speed — reducing their movement range each turn. Does not affect Electric-types. Pikachu's signature status move — crippling fast opponents like Gengar (110 SPE) or Charizard (100 SPE) and denying their speed advantage.
